name: ZB MED LifeData
description:
ZB MED LifeData is a repository for life sciences research data, operated by ZB MED – Information Centre for Life Sciences. It enables the FAIR-compliant publication and long-term availability of research datasets across the life sciences, including agriculture, environment, nutrition, and biomedicine. Datasets receive persistent identifiers (DOI), and metadata remain publicly accessible. LifeData supports open, embargoed, and controlled-access publication workflows, including structured access procedures for datasets with defined protection requirements. It represents the functional continuation and further development of the Fachrepositorium Lebenswissenschaften (FRL) for research data.

More information can be found on [lifedata.zbmed.de/](https://lifedata.zbmed.de/).
